notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **Fixed a startup hang / runaway memory on certain notes.** A note whose block
  hierarchy contained a corrupted loop (a block that was its own ancestor) could
  send the app into an unbounded loop on launch — pinning the CPU and consuming
  all available memory before the window ever appeared. The descendant lookup
  now terminates safely on such data, the corrupted link is repaired
  automatically on launch, and the app no longer lets a loop be saved in the
  first place. Affected notes open normally again, with no data lost.
